text.message: game just started and already robbed 6 times
now everyone on the same level
couldn't you at least steal once from someone else
we're all on the same level
when you're so early in the game 9 robs are so frsutrating
especially when green is at ahead and has more devs
if that's some sort of joke
just to bully me out of the game
but I'll let time run down
especially when you're ahead and bullying someone

if you keep bullying I'll let time run out every round

wanted to do a favour and keep blue at check
I'll do something else and keep tab open
